label: 2026-04-18-no-anti-air
description: Mirror the intended April 18 board shape but refuse to spend on Bramble Spear. Thorn Vines cover lanes 1 and 3 as if they were normal ground lanes; Thornwing Moth should ignore that coverage, breach the 1 HP wall, and end the run before the grounded line matters.

placements.note: Open on economy so the replay still represents a serious attempt at the board rather than an intentionally empty lane.
Incorrect answer in lane 1: Thorn Vine fires, but its bolts pass underneath Thornwing.
Mirror the same wrong answer in lane 3.
Begin the grounded defense after the airborne failure is already committed.
Screen the Sunroot lane, but the replay should already be lost to the flying lanes.
